integrative_rules.treatment_combination: Give first dose of any applicable treatment before referral (AL for positive RDT, ORS for diarrhoea, amoxicillin for fast breathing). Then refer immediately.
integrative_rules.follow_up_rule: No community follow-up; facility assumes care.
integrative_rules.source_quote: CHWs identify signs of illness, treat diarrhoea, confirmed malaria, and pneumonia (cough with fast breathing). The findings determine whether to refer or treat at home.

integrative_rules.treatment_combination: No community treatment. Pre-referral first doses of any co-occurring treatable conditions only. Refer immediately.
integrative_rules.follow_up_rule: No community follow-up; facility assumes care.
integrative_rules.source_quote: A convulsion during the current illness is a danger sign. The child needs urgent referral.

integrative_rules.treatment_combination: Give first dose of amoxicillin before referral if supply_amoxicillin_250mg available. Refer urgently. Do not treat as simple pneumonia at community level.
integrative_rules.follow_up_rule: No community follow-up; facility assumes care.
integrative_rules.source_quote: This is a danger sign indicating severe pneumonia.

integrative_rules.treatment_combination: Give first doses of any co-occurring treatable conditions (ORS, AL, amoxicillin) before referral. Refer urgently for malnutrition management.
integrative_rules.follow_up_rule: No community follow-up; facility assumes care.
integrative_rules.source_quote: - RED: severe malnutrition - DANGER SIGN - refer urgently

integrative_rules.treatment_combination: Give first doses of any co-occurring treatable conditions (ORS, AL, amoxicillin) before referral. Refer urgently for malnutrition management.
integrative_rules.follow_up_rule: No community follow-up; facility assumes care.
integrative_rules.source_quote: If dents remain on BOTH feet, the child has severe malnutrition. Refer urgently.

integrative_rules.treatment_combination: When p_diarrhoea_treatable, p_pneumonia_treatable, and/or p_malaria_treatable are simultaneously true and p_any_referral_danger_sign is false, administer all applicable treatments concurrently: ORS + zinc for diarrhoea, amoxicillin for pneumonia, AL for malaria. All home care advice modules apply additively.
integrative_rules.follow_up_rule: Follow up ALL treated children in 3 days. Assess each condition independently at follow-up.
integrative_rules.source_quote: CHWs identify signs of illness, treat diarrhoea, confirmed malaria, and pneumonia (cough with fast breathing). The findings determine whether to refer or treat at home.

integrative_rules.treatment_combination: Advise caregiver to return immediately if child cannot drink or feed, becomes sicker, or has blood in stool, regardless of which conditions are being treated.
integrative_rules.follow_up_rule: Immediate return supersedes the scheduled 3-day follow-up. On immediate return, re-assess all danger signs and refer if any present.
integrative_rules.source_quote: - Return immediately if the child: cannot drink or feed, becomes sicker, or has blood in stool.

integrative_rules.treatment_combination: If at 3-day follow-up any treated condition is not improving or is worse, refer to facility. Continue current treatments until seen at facility.
integrative_rules.follow_up_rule: Refer if not better or worse at 3-day follow-up for any treated condition.
integrative_rules.source_quote: Follow up ALL children treated at home in 3 days. If the child is not better or is worse at follow-up, refer.

integrative_rules.treatment_combination: At 3-day follow-up: if q_follow_up_diarrhoea_still_present is true and total duration < 14 days, continue ORS and zinc. If total duration >= 14 days, refer.
integrative_rules.follow_up_rule: If diarrhoea continues but < 14 days, schedule another follow-up in 3 days. If >= 14 days, refer immediately.
integrative_rules.source_quote: After 3 days: Is the child still having diarrhoea? If yes and for less than 14 days, continue ORS and zinc. If 14 days or more, refer.

integrative_rules.treatment_combination: At 3-day follow-up: if q_follow_up_fever_still_present is true and prior p_rdt_positive was true and AL was given, refer to facility.
integrative_rules.follow_up_rule: Refer; do not repeat AL course at community level.
integrative_rules.source_quote: After 3 days: Does the child still have fever? If RDT was positive and antimalarial was given, the child needs referral.

integrative_rules.treatment_combination: At 3-day follow-up: if q_follow_up_fever_still_present is true and prior p_rdt_negative was true, refer to facility for further evaluation.
integrative_rules.follow_up_rule: Refer; fever of unknown origin beyond 3 days requires facility assessment.
integrative_rules.source_quote: If RDT was negative and fever persists, refer.

integrative_rules.treatment_combination: When referring a child with p_fever_present true, advise caregiver to keep the child cool during travel to the facility.
integrative_rules.follow_up_rule: Not applicable; child is being referred.
integrative_rules.source_quote: If fever, keep the child cool during travel.

integrative_rules.treatment_combination: When referring a child with p_diarrhoea_present true, provide ORS solution to give during travel to the facility. Requires supply_ors_packet.
integrative_rules.follow_up_rule: Not applicable; child is being referred.
integrative_rules.source_quote: If diarrhoea, give ORS solution during travel.
